@graph.label: Cor.3.12 (IUTchIII) is a Mochizuki-formulated corollary asserting a multiradial bound on log-volume valid up to indeterminacies Ind1, Ind2, Ind3
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level summary of the corollary's existence and shape; not an assertion of its mathematical correctness.

@graph.label: IUT proves the abc conjecture (Mochizuki, original 2012)
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level claim attribution; no prose redistribution.

@graph.label: Cor.3.12 reduces to a trivial inequality under harmless simplification (Scholze-Stix 2018)
@graph.specific_objection: After identifying canonical copies of the theta-link, the multiradial algorithm reduces to a tautology incapable of yielding a height inequality (Scholze-Stix 2018, p.10: 'leads to an empty inequality'; p.9: 'this data is canonically the same on both sides').
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level summary with verbatim short quotations.

@graph.label: Distinct copies of Hodge Theaters do not exist in the form required (SS sub-claim 1)
@graph.specific_objection: Scholze-Stix 2018, p.6 (PDF-verified 2026-05-06): 'up to equivalence of categories, choosing a Hodge theater is equivalent to choosing a once-punctured elliptic curve abstractly isomorphic to X'; the equivalence of categories implies the distinctness of copies needed for the inter-universal argument is not present at the formal level.
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level paraphrase + verbatim short quotation of Scholze-Stix 2018, p.6 (equivalence-of-categories argument).

@graph.label: Anabelian geometry plays no essential role at the disputed step (SS sub-claim 2)
@graph.specific_objection: Scholze-Stix 2018, Remark 9, p.5: 'we could not find the point in the proof where it [anabelian geometry] is essential'.

@graph.label: Fundamental groups and geometry are equivalent and commute, making the IUT operations trivial (SS sub-claim 3)
@graph.specific_objection: Scholze-Stix 2018, p.9 footnote 12 (PDF-verified 2026-05-06): 'the critical [IUTT-3, Theorem 3.11] does not become false, but trivial' — under the canonical identifications taken consistently, the multiradial algorithm reduces to a tautology because the fundamental-group / geometry equivalence makes the commutation trivial.
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level paraphrase + verbatim short quotation of Scholze-Stix 2018, footnote 12 p.9.

@graph.label: The simplification proposed by Scholze-Stix is not harmless; it destroys the inter-universal un-entangling structure (Mochizuki 2018)
IUT four papers accepted and published by PRIMS, 2021-03
@graph.fair_use_note: Publication is a factual event; does not constitute external mathematical verification.

@graph.label: A substantial portion of the Western mathematical commentariat publicly remains skeptical of the IUT proof
@graph.fair_use_note: Informal community commentary; not a peer-reviewed consensus statement. Word 'majority' avoided as no formal poll exists.

@graph.label: Arithmetic Teichmuller Spaces yield a corrected framework where abc follows (Joshi v1 2025-04, v2 2026-05)
@graph.specific_objection: Joshi (arXiv:2505.10568v2 abstract): the alleged gap identified by Scholze-Stix in IUTchIII Cor.3.12 can be repaired by reformulating Mochizuki's setup via Arithmetic Teichmüller Spaces (ATS); under ATS, the abc conjecture follows. This is neither a defense of the original IUT proof nor an endorsement of the SS critique as terminal; it is a reformulation.
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level summary of the abstract; full preprint not redistributed. Informal third-party objections (Scholze MathOverflow, Sawin locality critique) have been reported in community channels but stable URLs were not verified at 2026-05-06; pending evidence-add via GitHub Issues with the `evidence-only` label.

@graph.label: LANA project (2026-03-31) is formalizing anabelian geometry and IUT in Lean 4
@graph.status: mid-report-scheduled-2026-07-17; team has articulated a specific contentious point but not yet resolved it (per Mochizuki 2026-04 PDF)
@graph.fair_use_note: Project announcement and progress report; no mathematical verdict yet.

@graph.label: Not Even Wrong (Woit) ongoing skeptical commentary on Mochizuki reports (2025-2026)
Mochizuki 2025-10 IUT progress report continues defense of original framework
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level summary based on PDF metadata only; full content not redistributed.

@graph.label: Yamashita 2024 survey provides an independent exposition of the IUT proof framework
@graph.fair_use_note: Yamashita is a Mochizuki-aligned proponent; this exposition is a re-presentation, not an independent verification.
